problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization — specifically Self-assembled monolayer for — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
